$comment: c81 (the sqlite shell.c CLI route): ship <pwd.h> — getpwuid + the glibc-exact struct passwd (7 fields; libc returns ITS OWN struct, so reading pw_uid/pw_gid/pw_dir/pw_shell at the derived offsets is the layout proof — root's uid must echo 0, home/shell must be absolute paths). uid_t comes from sys/types.json (one canonical home). HONEST TOLERANCE: NULL from getpwuid (NSS unavailable under qemu-user) exits 42 without probing — the WSL x86_64 leg is the guaranteed layout proof. Gated [elf] only — Darwin's struct passwd diverges (pw_change/pw_class/pw_expire); fail-loud unavailable beats a silent wrong layout. RED-ON-DISABLE: remove pwd.json -> F001A.
